title: Optimized Tornadoes
description: Its the Weather2 Weather storms and tornados mod on Fabric plus with the fabulously optimized mod pack that a ton of people use
body:
## Switch to Java 21 Fix's launch issues 






Credits to Fabosulously optmized mod pack and Corosus for the mods I merge them together using Kilt which is still new but I tested it and it worked so people that want to be on fabric but do a tornado survial with it you can Links to modpacks I used [KiltMC,](https://github.com/KiltMC/Kilt) [Fabulously Optimized ModPack,](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) [And Weather Storms & Tornadoes](https://modrinth.com/mod/weather-storms-tornadoes) many more mods but go look at Fabulously Optimized for 1.20.1 to look at the mods they have and Weather2 needs Coreus

Mod List 

[Memory Leak Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/memoryleakfix)

[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)

[Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)

For [Kilt MC](https://modrinth.com/mod/kilt)Im going to give different links to their discord server where they are the creators and are able to make this possible [KiltMC Discord Server](https://discord.gg/Z7wHS5ErjD)
